stages.concept:
# Unit 022: 수량 표현 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **수량 표현**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> There are **many** books on the shelf.
> 선반 위에 많은 책들이 있다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 수량 표현은 명사의 양이나 수를 나타내는 말이에요. 셀 수 있는 명사와 셀 수 없는 명사에 따라 쓰이는 표현이 달라요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **셀 수 있는 명사** 앞에 쓰는 수량 표현:

> **many** books (많은 책들)
> **a few** friends (몇 명의 친구들)
> **few** students (거의 없는 학생들)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **셀 수 없는 명사** 앞에 쓰는 수량 표현:

> **much** water (많은 물)
> **a little** sugar (약간의 설탕)
> **little** money (거의 없는 돈)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **둘 다** 쓸 수 있는 수량 표현:

> **a lot of** books / **a lot of** water (많은)
> **some** apples / **some** milk (약간의)
> **any** questions / **any** money (어떤, 부정문/의문문에서)

🧑‍🎓 학생: many/few는 셀 수 있는 명사, much/little은 셀 수 없는 명사에 쓰면 되고, a lot of는 둘 다 가능하군요!

| | 셀 수 있는 명사 | 셀 수 없는 명사 | 둘 다 |
|------|------|------|------|
| 많은 | many | much | a lot of |
| 약간의 | a few | a little | some |
| 거의 없는 | few | little | - |
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 022: 관사 a, an - 연습문제 A

**01.** 빈칸에 a 또는 an 을 쓰시오.
I saw (     ) elephant at the zoo.
> **정답** an

---

**02.** 빈칸에 a 또는 an 을 쓰시오.
She is (     ) kind girl.
> **정답** a

---

**03.** 빈칸에 a 또는 an 을 쓰시오.
He ate (     ) apple for lunch.
> **정답** an

---

**04.** 빈칸에 a 또는 an 을 쓰시오.
I need (     ) umbrella today.
> **정답** an

---

**05.** 빈칸에 a 또는 an 을 쓰시오.
She is (     ) honest student.
> **정답** an

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
He is an teacher at our school.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** an → a

---

**07.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I bought a orange at the market.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** a → an

---

**08.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She wore a uniform to school.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** (맞는 문장 — uniform은 /juː/ 발음이라 a가 맞음)

---

**09.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
He ate a egg for breakfast.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** a → an

---

**10.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I have an uncle who is a engineer.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** a engineer → an engineer

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그는 한 시간 동안 기다렸다.
He waited for hour.
> **정답** an

---

**12.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
나는 고양이 한 마리를 키운다.
I have cat.
> **정답** a

---

**13.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그녀에게 흥미로운 이야기가 있다.
She has interesting story.
> **정답** an

---

**14.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
나는 새 노트북이 필요하다.
I need new notebook.
> **정답** a

---

**15.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그것은 매우 쉬운 문제이다.
It is easy question.
> **정답** an

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
나는 어젯밤에 영화를 한 편 보았다.
a watched I last night movie
> **정답** I / watched / a / movie / last / night

---

**17.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
그는 미술가이다.
an He artist is
> **정답** He / is / an / artist

---

**18.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
그녀는 우산을 가지고 왔다.
an She umbrella brought
> **정답** She / brought / an / umbrella

---

**19.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
나에게 기회를 한 번 주세요.
a me Give chance
> **정답** Give / me / a / chance

---

**20.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을 완성하시오.
그것은 오래된 건물이다.
an old It is building
> **정답** It / is / an / old / building
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 022: 수량 표현 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 중 수량 표현이 명사와 잘못 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
a glass of apple juice
a slice of bread
much time
many homework
> **정답** many homework

---

**02.** 다음 중 수량 표현이 명사와 잘못 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
a slice of cake
two slices of cheeses
three bowls of rice
two pieces of pie
> **정답** two slices of cheeses

---

**03.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I bought a bar of soap at the store.
He had two slices of cheese and bread for
lunch.
The boy put a spoonful of sugar into his
tea.
My parents gave me a pound of advice.
> **정답** My parents gave me a pound of advice.

---

**04.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
She bought two loaves of bread at the shop.
He brought a can of cake for the party.
My sister ate a bowl of cereal very quickly.
I needed a piece of information for the trip.
> **정답** He brought a can of cake for the party.

---

**05.** 다음 그림을 보고 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게
![그림](public/images/units/022_desc_02.webp)
짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
At the party, I had a ________________ of pie and a
______________ of juice.
slice - bowl
piece - glass
bar - bottle
loaf - glass
> **정답** piece - glass

---

**06.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
To make a sandwich, the cook needs three
______________ of cheese and four ____________ of
ham.
glasses
slices
loaves
pounds
> **정답** slices

---

**07.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 수 없는 것을 고르시오.
She bought a pair of _____________ at the shop
yesterday.
socks
glasses
shoes
caps
> **정답** caps

---

**08.** 다음 중 어법에 맞지 않는 문장을 고르시오.
Emma drank two slices of water.
Tom wants a piece of advice from his coach.
His lunch was two slices of bread.
I got a pair of shoes for my birthday present.
> **정답** Emma drank two slices of water.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법에 맞지 않는 문장을 고르시오.
They ordered two glasses of orange juice at a
shop.
Mom put a spoonful of pepper into the
soup.
I did my homework on two sheets of papers.
A bowl of cereal was not enough for my
breakfast.
> **정답** I did my homework on two sheets of papers.

---

**10.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 쓸 때 사용하지 않는
단어를 고르시오.
그 남자들은 지난밤 주스 두 병을 열었다.
two bottles of juice
opened
The men
two bottles of juices
> **정답** two bottles of juices

---

**11.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 쓸 때 사용하지 않는
단어를 고르시오.
영어선생님은 두 장의 종이를 나눠주셨다.
two pieces of papers
two pieces of paper
gave out
An English teacher
> **정답** two pieces of papers

---

**12.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 쓸 때 사용하지 않는
단어를 고르시오.
Jake는 많은 숙제를 가지고 있다.
much homework
has
Jake
many homework
> **정답** many homework

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 문장을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Tom had two cans of cereal before going to
school.
Their parents helped them with a slice of
advice.
The cook added a spoonful of salt onto the
chicken.
My mom brought home two loaves of bread.
> **정답** Their parents helped them with a slice of advice.,
Tom had two cans of cereal before going to school.

---

**14.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
The workers have a lot of work to do today.
I want a few sugar in the drink.
Amy is wearing a pair of glasses all the time.
People in the area had very little rain last year.
> **정답** I want a few sugar in the drink.

---

**15.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
어머니는 꿀 두 스푼을 물 한 컵에 떨어뜨렸다.
Mother dropped two spoonfuls of honey into a
glasses of water.
Mother dropped two spoonfuls of honeys into
a glass of water.
Mother dropped two spoonfuls of honey into a
glass of water.
Mother dropped two spoonfuls of honeys into
a glass of waters.
> **정답** Mother dropped two spoonfuls of honey into a glass
of water.

---

**16.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
너무 많은 숙제가 있었기 때문에 한 소녀는 선생님께 조언을
요청했다.
Because she had too much homeworks, a girl
asked a teacher for a piece of advice.
Because she had too much homework, a girl
asked a teacher for a piece of advice.
Because she had too many homeworks, a girl
asked a teacher for a piece of advice.
Because she had too many homework, a girl
asked a teacher for a piece of advice.
> **정답** Because she had too much homework, a girl asked a
teacher for a piece of advice.

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고 바르게 고치세요.
To make egg soup, I boiled
a little eggs.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** little → few

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고 바르게 고치세요.
She put two loaf of bread
into a oven and heated them
up.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** loaf → loaves

---

**19.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개]
Mrs. Park works at a help center. Her job
is giving each person
pieces of information . She always has
too much work and has too
few time to take a break. She gets
many money from the work. But, she worries
about her health.
> **정답** pieces of information, much work, little time, much
money

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개]
On the weekend, I went shopping with my mom.
We went to the mall. I bought
a piece of sunglasses.
And my mom bought two bottles of water. We
ordered a piece of cheesecake and
two cup of teas at the cafe.
> **정답** a pair of, two cups of tea
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 022 수량 표현중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 다음 그림을 보고, 주어진 단어에 알맞는 수량 표현을
![그림](public/images/units/022_desc_01.webp)
이용해 문장을 완성하시오. (숫자는 기수로)
힌트 (     ) 1 juice, 3 cake
There are  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  and 
 of cake on the table.
정답 a, glass, of, juice, three, pieces

---

**02.** 다음 그림을 보고, 주어진 단어에 알맞는 수량 표현을
![그림](public/images/units/022_desc_02.webp)
이용해 문장을 완성하시오. (숫자는 기수로)
힌트 (     ) 1 coffee, 2 bread
They shared  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  and
  (     )   (     )   (     )  together.
정답 a, cup, of, coffee, two, loaves, of, bread

---

**03.** 주어진 말에 알맞는 수량 표현을 이용하여 질문에
대답하는 문장을 완성하시오. (숫자는 기수로)
힌트 (     ) 1 scissors, 1 glue
A: What do the students need for art class?
B: They need  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  and
  (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 a, pair, of, scissors, a, stick, of, glue

---

**04.** 주어진 말에 알맞는 수량 표현을 이용하여 질문에
대답하는 문장을 완성하시오. (숫자는 기수로)
힌트 (     ) 우유 1병, 시리얼 1그릇
A: What's on the table?
B: There are  (     )   (     )   (     )  milk and 
  (     )  cereal on the table.
정답 a, bottle, of, a, bowl, of

---

**05.** 주어진 말에 알맞는 수량 표현을 이용하여 질문에
대답하는 문장을 완성하시오. (숫자는 기수로)
힌트 (     ) 바지 2벌, 신발 2컬레
A: What did you buy at the shopping mall?
B: I bought  (     )   (     )   (     )  pants and 
  (     )  shoes.
정답 two, pairs, of, two, pairs, of

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현에 알맞은 수량 표현을 더해
문장을 완성하시오.
Lisa는 숙제가 많아서 밥먹을 시간이 많이 없다.
[homework, time]
Lisa has  (     )   (     ) . So, she doesn't have
  (     )  for meals.
정답 much, homework, much, time

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현에 알맞은 수량 표현을 더해
문장을 완성하시오.
나는 시리얼 한 그릇에 꿀 두 스푼을 넣었다. [honey,
cereal]
I put two  (     )   (     )   (     )  into a 
  (     ) .
정답 spoonfuls, of, honey, bowl, of, cereal

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현에 알맞은 수량 표현을 더해
문장을 완성하시오.
엄마는 샌드위치를 만들기 위해 빵 한덩이와 치즈 두 장을
샀다. [bread, cheese]
Mom bought a  (     )   (     )   (     )  and two
  (     )   (     )  for sandwiches.
정답 loaf, of, bread, slices (pieces), of, cheese

---

**09.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개]
We had [little rain] (     )  last month, but it will
be different this month. The news told us
a slice of (     )  information
about weather. It says there will be
a lot of rain (     )  this month.
There will also be [many snow] (     )  this winter.
정답 little rain, a piece of, a lot of rain, much snow

---

**10.** 다음 그림을 보고 적절한 어구를 선택하세요
![그림](public/images/units/022_desc_01.webp)
Amy had [?] (     )  milk and [?] (     )  cake for lunch.
And Tom had [?] (     )  juice and [?] (     )  for lunch.
정답 ① a glass of ② a piece of ③ a cup of ④ two slices of
pizza

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개]
My son is a trouble maker. He always loses
a piece of (     )  his socks. He
often throws  (     ) a bar of
soap and  (     ) a stick of (     )  glue
at me. Every morning, he spills
a bowl of (     )  cereal. He
sometimes breaks
a sheet of (     )  glasses. He
gives me a headache.
정답 a pair of, a bar of, a stick of, a bowl of, a pair of

---

**12.** 어법상 어색한 부분을 선택하고 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
[The]  [woman]  [had]  a  [loaf]  [of]
[bread]  [and]  [two]  [cups]  [of]  [coffees.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 coffees. → coffee

---

**13.** 어법상 어색한 부분을 선택하고 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
I  [wanted]  a  [slice]  [of]  [advice]
[from]  [my]  [mom.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 slice → piece

---

**14.** 어법상 어색한 부분을 선택하고 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
[The]  [student]  [asked]  [for]  [two]
[sheet]  [of]  [paper.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 sheet → sheets (pieces)

---

**15.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
목욕탕 안에 비누 한 개가 있다.
힌트 (     ) of, a, soap, bar
There is  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  in the
bathtub.
정답 a, bar, of, soap

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
그녀는 자신의 아들을 위해 두 쌍의 양말을 구매했다.
힌트 (     )  of, socks, two, pairs
She bought  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  for her
son.
정답 two, pairs, of, socks

---

**17.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
그 남자는 주스 한 병과 피자 두 조각을 주문했다.
힌트 (     ) of, a, bottle, juice, slices, two, of, pizza
The man ordered  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  and
  (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 a, bottle, of, juice, two, slices, of, pizza

---

**18.** 주어진 단어를 이용해 글을 완성하시오. (필요시 형태를
변형할 것)
spoonful / slice / bottle
The cook in the restaurant is cooking. First, he put two
 of oil in the pan. Then he added two drops of
milk and put three  (     )  of ham in the pan. When
he finishes, he will serve the food with a  (     )  of
juice and two slices of bread.
정답 spoonfuls, slices, bottle

---

**19.** 주어진 단어를 이용해 글을 완성하시오. (필요시 형태를
변형할 것)
piece / sheet / glass
I have a lot of worries these days. So I went to see a
teacher to get a  (     )  of advice. When the teacher
saw me, she offered me two  (     )  of water and two
 of paper. I wrote my worries on the paper
while I was drinking.
정답 piece, glasses, sheets

---

**20.** 다음 문장을 어순배열 하시오.
그녀는 많은 시간을 가지고 있지 않았다.
[much] [many] [have]
[didn't] [She] [time.]
정답 She / didn't / have / much / time.

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 022: 수량 표현 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 중 수량 표현이 명사와 잘못 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
a glass of water a slice of bread much money many homework ![그림](public/images/units/022_desc_01.webp)
> 정답: many homework

---

**02.** 다음 중 수량 표현이 명사와 잘못 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
a slice of ham two slices of breads three bowls of soup two pieces of pie
> 정답: two slices of breads

---

**03.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I bought a bar of chocolate in the store.
He had two slices of pizza and salad for lunch.
The woman put a spoonful of honey into her tea.
My parents gave me a pound of advice.
> 정답: My parents gave me a pound of advice.

---

**04.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
She bought two loaves of bread at the bakery.
He brought a can of cookies for the party.
My sister ate a bowl of rice very quickly.
I needed a piece of information for the project.
> 정답: He brought a can of cookies for the party.

---

**05.** 다음 그림을 보고 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
At the party, I had a ________________ of pizza and a ______________ of juice.
slice - bowl piece - glass bar - bottle loaf - glass
> 정답: piece - glass

---

**06.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
To make a salad, the cook needs three ______________ of tomato and four ____________ of cucumber.
glasses slices loaves pounds
> 정답: slices

---

**07.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 수 없는 것을 고르시오.
She bought a pair of _____________ at the mall yesterday. socks sunglasses pants bags
> 정답: bags

---

**08.** 다음 중 어법에 맞지 않는 문장을 고르시오.
Amy drank two slices of orange juice.
Tom wants a piece of advice from his teacher.
His lunch was two slices of pizza.
I got a pair of sneakers for my birthday gift.
> 정답: Amy drank two slices of orange juice.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법에 맞지 않는 문장을 고르시오.
They ordered two glasses of lemonade at a cafe.
Dad put a spoonful of salt into the soup.
I did my homework on two sheets of papers.
A bowl of noodles was not enough for my lunch.
> 정답: I did my homework on two sheets of papers.

---

**10.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 쓸 때 사용하지 않는 단어를 고르시오.
그 여자들은 지난밤 주스 두 병을 열었다. two bottles of juice opened The women two bottles of juices
> 정답: two bottles of juices

---

**11.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 쓸 때 사용하지 않는 단어를 고르시오.
수학선생님은 두 장의 종이를 나눠주셨다. two pieces of papers two pieces of paper gave out A math teacher
> 정답: two pieces of papers

---

**12.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 쓸 때 사용하지 않는 단어를 고르시오.
Jake는 많은 숙제를 가지고 있다. much homework has Jake many homework
> 정답: many homework

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 문장을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Tom had two cans of soup before going to work.
Their parents helped them with a slice of advice.
The chef added a spoonful of sugar onto the dessert.
My dad brought home two loaves of bread.
> 정답: Their parents helped them with a slice of advice., Tom had two cans of soup before going to work.

---

**14.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
The workers have a lot of work to do today.
I want a few sugar in the coffee.
Kate is wearing a pair of glasses all the time.
People in Korea had very little snow last year.
> 정답: I want a few sugar in the coffee.

---

**15.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
어머니는 설탕 두 스푼을 우유 한 컵에 넣었다.
Mother dropped two spoonfuls of sugar into a glasses of milk.
Mother dropped two spoonfuls of sugars into a glass of milk.
Mother dropped two spoonfuls of sugar into a glass of milk.
Mother dropped two spoonfuls of sugars into a glass of milks.
> 정답: Mother dropped two spoonfuls of sugar into a glass of milk.

---

**16.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
너무 많은 숙제가 있었기 때문에 한 소년은 선생님께 조언을 요청했다.
Because he had too much homeworks, a boy asked a teacher for a piece of advice.
Because he had too much homework, a boy asked a teacher for a piece of advice.
Because he had too many homeworks, a boy asked a teacher for a piece of advice.
Because he had too many homework, a boy asked a teacher for a piece of advice.
> 정답: Because he had too much homework, a boy asked a teacher for a piece of advice.

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고 바르게 고치세요. To make a sandwich, I used a little tomatoes. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: little → few

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고 바르게 고치세요. She put two loaf of bread into an oven and heated them up. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: loaf → loaves

---

**19.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오. [2개]
Mrs. Park works at a service center.
Her job is giving each person pieces of information.
She always has too much work and has too few time to take a break.
She gets much money from the work.
But, she worries about her health.
> 정답: few → little

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오. [2개]
On the weekend, I went shopping with my dad.
We went to the mall.
I bought a piece of sunglasses.
And my dad bought two bottles of water.
We ordered a piece of cheesecake and two cup of coffees at the cafe.
> 정답: a piece of → a pair of, two cup of coffees → two cups of coffee
